security_boundary.reason: all convolutions use the exact Q16 reveal/re-share correctness backend; this is not a no-reveal deployment claim

python_requirement: No retraining. PyTorch is optional and used only to regenerate the bundled frozen Q16 oracle.
release_note: Locally validated end-to-end on all 100 balanced samples: logits exact 100/100, Top-1 72/100, Top-5 91/100.

installer_hardening.change: Stage-S contract runner injects DAZG_ORBIT_STAGE_S_Q16_TABLE directly into the child process after byte-size and SHA-256 verification
